headline: ₹100-300 Cr at risk if ESG score stagnates and passive fund outflows accelerate — Adani Power receives ESG score of 65 from NSE, signaling moderate sustainability progress
what_matters: No immediate P/E rerating; moderate risk of valuation discount versus ESG leaders.
BRSR mandatory disclosure met; no penalty, but ongoing SEBI scrutiny if score does not improve.
Limited ESG fund inflows; potential for 20-40bps higher cost of capital if score stagnates.
action: No immediate action required, but improvement in ESG score is advisable to maintain competitiveness and access to ESG capital.
Opportunity: Proactive ESG disclosure upgrades can differentiate Adani Power and attract new ESG-focused investors
